TextView.android:text:
Stay Refreshed: Your Hydration Companion
 Water is the fuel that keeps your body and mind running at peak performance. Since 60% of the human body is water, staying hydrated is one of the simplest yet most effective ways to boost your energy, clarity, and overall health.


💧 Why Hydration Matters
 Every system in your body depends on water. Proper hydration helps you:
 Boost Brain Power: Even mild dehydration can lead to fatigue and brain fog.
 Fuel Your Work: Keep your joints lubricated and your muscles energized during long tasks.
 Clearer Skin: Help your body flush out toxins for a natural, healthy glow.
 Temperature Control: Keep your internal cooling system working perfectly, especially on warm days.


⏰ Smart Reminders
 Life gets busy, and it's easy to forget to take a sip. Our Hydration Alerts are designed to nudge you toward your daily goal without being a distraction. Gentle Nudges: Receive subtle notifications throughout the day.
 Custom Goals: We’ll calculate your ideal intake based on your activity level and environment. Progress Tracking: Watch your daily water ring close as you log every glass.


Tips for Meeting Your Goal
 Keep it Visible: Always have a reusable bottle within arm's reach of your workstation.
 Flavor it Up: If plain water feels boring, try adding a slice of lemon, cucumber, or a few mint leaves.
 Drink with Meals: Make it a habit to finish a full glass of water with every meal or snack.
 Listen to Your Body: If you feel a headache or a slump in energy, it’s usually time for a refill.


Quick Tip: By the time you feel thirsty, your body is already slightly dehydrated. Aim to sip consistently rather than chugging all at once!

 [Set Your Daily Goal] [Log a Glass +250ml]
